first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning across all sections is substantively the same. Both evaluations correctly identify the same core weaknesses: insufficient C++ experience, lack of specific database skills (SQL Server/Oracle), and no capital markets domain knowledge. The minor differences in phrasing and the estimation of C++ experience duration (~7 months vs. ~6 months) are well within the expected range of run-to-run noise and do not indicate any bias related to the change in location.
